title: The Hidden Port Below Dressrosa
description: Pages 1–5 focus on the hidden port below dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the underground operation advances as Usopp, Robin, the Tontatta, and Franky move toward the factory and Sugar.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Land is Blan- Keted by Evil!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We gave you the money, so spare our lives...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What on earth has happened to his high-ness!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The whole country is in a panic!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I thought he was acting strange when he burst out of the palace earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But to think that he would go and do something like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I think the situation is beyond one we can deal with at this point...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: So I've Contac- Ted the Marines!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We'll leave every- thing to captain vergo,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He'll be taking over from here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: monet!? What are you doing, there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Why did a maid like you open up the Palace gates....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: If you just use your `Clair- Voyance' ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: You'd see just what's happening in this country now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I expect you'd see it quite clearly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: There's a blaze coming from the East Tower!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I like the look of this place. Not bad.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: A fitting palace for the young master!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: What have you bastards done to King Riku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Looks like this palace requires a bit of cleaning!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: If you would have me strike down my country- men....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Did we... Did we do something wrong....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: You're always so kind and just!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: you're our king, who we take so much pride in...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: because it was you who said to hand over our money...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Because you always think of us, first....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: ...King Riku is tram- piling all over our hearts!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: He stole our money, and now he means to kill us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: All in his own self- interest...!! He's treat- ing us like garbage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the day, and I was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #65
dialogue.text: The Riku Royal Army is coming!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #66
dialogue.text: Hey, get away from there! Run away!!

summary: The Hidden Port Below Dressrosa focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the underground operation advances as Usopp, Robin, the Tontatta, and Franky move toward the factory and Sugar.
